title: eriosema spicatum subsp. collinum
intro: Eriosema spicatum subsp. collinum, also known as the "thorny pea," is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Eriosema spicatum subsp. collinum include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as providing relief from skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its leaves and stems can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
